memoryArtifacts.headline: Breve história da vida de John Montagu
memoryArtifacts.description:
Seu pai,Willian montagu e sua mãe Lady Catherine GladisonCountessof Salisbury tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Maragaret Monthermer em02/07/1350,em Stokenhan,Devon, Inglaterra.
Tiveram mais ou menos 5 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Montagu於1328年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親William Montagu27歲，母親Catherine Grandison12歲。他於1350年7月2日與Margaret de Monthermer在英國戴文斯托肯哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他於1381年被列為steward of the household of king richard ii。他去世於1389年2月25日在英國英格蘭戴文斯托肯哈姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Montagu于1328年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲William Montagu27岁，母亲Catherine Grandison12岁。他于1350年7月2日与Margaret de Monthermer在英国戴文斯托肯哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他于1381年被列为steward of the household of king richard ii。他去世于1389年2月25日在英国英格兰戴文斯托肯哈姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Montagu was born in 1328, in Somerset, England, his father, William Montagu, was 27 and his mother, Catherine Grandison, was 12. He married Margaret de Monthermer on 2 July 1350, in Stokenham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1346. In 1381, his occupation is listed as steward of the household of king richard ii. He died on 25 February 1389, in Stokenham, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Montagu est né en 1328, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grandison, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Monthermer le 2 juillet 1350, à Stokenham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. En 1381, sa profession de son indiquée est steward of the household of king richard ii. Il est décédé le 25 février 1389, à Stokenham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Montagu 1328 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Montagu 27 und seine Mutter Catherine Grandison 12. Er hat am 2. Juli 1350 in Stokenham, Devon, England Margaret de Monthermer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1381 ist sein Beruf als steward of the household of king richard ii aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Februar 1389 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Stokenham, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Montagu è nato il nel 1328 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, William Montagu, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Grandison, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Monthermer il 2 luglio 1350, nel Stokenham, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Nel 1381, la sua occupazione è indicata come steward of the household of king richard ii. Morì il 25 febbraio 1389, nel Stokenham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Montaguが1328年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父William Montaguは27歳，母Catherine Grandisonは12歳であった。1350年7月2日にイギリスデボンストケンハムでMargaret de Monthermerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。1381年，職業はsteward of the household of king richard iiと記録されている。彼は1389年2月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンストケンハムで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Montagu(이)가 1328년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Montagu(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Grandison(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1350년 7월 2일 영국 데폰 스토켄함에서 Margaret de Monthermer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1381년, 그의 직업은 steward of the household of king richard ii이었다. 그는 1389년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토켄함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England: Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Montagu nasceu em 1328, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Montagu, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Grandison, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Monthermer em 2 de julho de 1350, em Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Em 1381, sua profissão aparece como steward of the household of king richard ii. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1389, em Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England: Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Montagu родился в 1328 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William Montagu было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grandison, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Monthermer 2 июля 1350 г. в местности стокенам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1381 годуработал по профессии steward of the household of king richard ii. Он умер 25 февраля 1389 г. в местности стокенам, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England: Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Montagu nació en 1328, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Montagu, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine Grandison, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Margaret de Monthermer el 2 de julio de 1350, en Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. En 1381, su ocupación registrada era steward of the household of king richard ii. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1389, en Stokenham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
